app.description:
Webhooks lets you connect your account with external systems and automate workflows in real time.
Instantly send appointment, customer, or payment events to your own apps or third-party services — enabling powerful integrations and seamless data sync.

url.label: Webhook URL
url.tooltip: Enter the URL where webhook events will be sent via POST requests

secret.label: Webhook Secret (Optional)
secret.tooltip: If provided, webhook payloads will be signed with HMAC-SHA256. Leave empty to send webhooks without signatures.

eventTypes.label: Event Types
eventTypes.tooltip: Select which events should trigger webhooks to this URL

created.label: Appointment Created
created.description: Triggered when a new appointment is created

created.label: Customer Created
created.description: Triggered when a new customer is created

updated.label: Customer Updated
updated.description: Triggered when customer information is updated

created.label: Payment Created
created.description: Triggered when a new payment is created

updated.label: Payment Updated
updated.description: Triggered when payment information is updated

deleted.label: Payment Deleted
deleted.description: Triggered when a payment is deleted

refunded.label: Payment Refunded
refunded.description: Triggered when a payment is refunded

created.label: Waitlist Entry Created
created.description: Triggered when a waitlist entry is created (Waitlist app is required)

dismissed.label: Waitlist Entries Dismissed
dismissed.description: Triggered when a waitlist entries are dismissed (Waitlist app is required)

created.label: Form Response Created
created.description: Triggered when a form response is created (Forms app is required)

created.label: Gift Card Created
created.description: Triggered when a gift card is created

updated.label: Gift Card Updated
updated.description: Triggered when a gift card is updated

deleted.label: Gift Cards Deleted
deleted.description: Triggered when a gift cards are deleted

status_changed.label: Gift Cards Status Changed
status_changed.description: Triggered when a gift cards status changes

created.label: Discount Created
created.description: Triggered when a discount is created

updated.label: Discount Updated
updated.description: Triggered when a discount is updated

applied.label: Discount Applied
applied.description: Triggered when a discount is applied

created.label: Service Created
created.description: Triggered when a service is created

updated.label: Service Updated
updated.description: Triggered when a service is updated

created.label: Addon Created
created.description: Triggered when an addon is created

updated.label: Addon Updated
updated.description: Triggered when an addon is updated

created.label: Field Created
created.description: Triggered when a field is created

updated.label: Field Updated
updated.description: Triggered when a field is updated

url.max: Webhook URL must be at most 2048 characters long

secret.max: Webhook secret must be at most 256 characters long

eventTypes.required: Please select at least one event type
